title: INtopBackup

items.title: Top DHS spokesperson who became a face of Trump immigration policy is leaving
items.description: Tricia McLaughlin has become the public face defending the Trump administration's mass deportation policy and immigration tactics over the past year.

items.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
